candidates.why: Best direct revenue line with reported values; more specific than the blank header 'Revenues'.
Alternate revenue label that could be used in other years; also a top-line revenue concept.
Revenue header, but appears unpopulated in the preview and less specific than the two detailed revenue rows.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for revenue labels; do not sum.

candidates.why: Most standard direct cost / cost of sales label among the candidates.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Revenue including Operation & Maintenance (Utility) - Total
candidates.why: Cost of revenue concept, but utility-specific and less likely to be the primary COGS line here.
COGS-like, but specifically excludes depreciation and is usually supplemental rather than the main reported COGS line.

variables.notes: Selected the most standard COGS/cost of sales row from the candidate list.

candidates.why: Candidate list provides an SG&A component, but a fuller explicit SG&A total row exists in the statement.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Good SG&A concept excluding R&D, but the more standard explicit SG&A line in the preview is 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total'.

variables.notes: Candidate list clearly misses the best explicit populated SG&A row. Per SG&A hierarchy, because an explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, select ONLY 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total'. Manual review flagged because final choice is outside the provided candidate list. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total

candidates.why: Direct reported R&D expense line.
Supplemental duplicate of the main R&D line; lower priority than the primary statement line.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Expensed & Capitalized - Total - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental R&D total; useful fallback but less preferred than the main line.

variables.notes: Primary reported R&D line exists; use as priority item.

candidates.why: Most direct standalone interest expense label.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Good fallback when the plain interest expense label is missing.
Less preferred because it nets interest income.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Lease-specific interest only, so too narrow for total interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list only; later code should take the first non-missing value by year.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner/parent-only equity line; avoids double counting with minority interest.
Equity-related, but excludes some intangibles and is not the standard book equity denominator.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Too broad because it includes minority interest/hybrid debt.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity line selected to keep BE separate from MIB.

candidates.why: Correct balance-sheet concept for non-controlling interests, but appears absent/unreported here.
Minority-interest related, but appears absent/unreported here.
Income statement allocation line, not the preferred balance-sheet stock measure for MIB.

variables.notes: No reported balance-sheet non-controlling interest is evident. Parent-attributable equity equals total equity, so MIB is set to 0 via empty mapping.
